name: User-defined RP(G)
description:
A role play of all societies, time periods, etc. You can do whatever the hell you want.

Before you start reading this, if you don't like this bot after you read the Prior Info, To Reiterate, Background/History, Instructions, or after you use the bot, then you don't have to complain about it; leave. I need feedback, not complaints or hate. I mean it. I mean this with love. <3

Prior Info

Please read this before continuing on to the the rest of the bio!

This is meant for 3rd POV! I deeply apologize for users who chat in 1st!

To be clear! This bot is meant for those who hate being restricted to certain scenarios, characters, time periods, etc. And those who have many ideas, different worlds, etc. And you don't want to make many bots on those worlds (if that makes sense).

To Reiterate

Info that has to be repeated, because some users decided that reading comprehension did not exist...

If a user comments about the bot or any comment in general that is mean, sarcastic, or it seems like a smartass wrote it; I'm deleting the comment, because some of y'all DO NOT read!

And I don't care if you don't like the fact that this is a BLANK BOT, because as I've said MULTIPLE times: if you don't like it; leave. Don't comment. Don't cry about it; just leave. There are MANY users who like this bot.

Background/History

This isn't important, but if you want to read it, go for it.

I've had this bot on private since I made it. I've never made it public, until (12/25/25). If you've seen the message count (53.1k)... yes, that's from me (It counts deleted chats and messages). The chats I did with this bot were: fluff, casual, smut, or just downright fucked up (torture, gore, you get it.) This and 2 other bots are the only bots I use.

PROXIES: I've never tried proxies, so I don't know if they'll work properly.

The token count is LOW, but that's on purpose (until I have to add stuff; probably not).

Even though I have made detailed bots (on both JAI & CAI), this is not one of them.

You! The user! It is your job to use your imagination to make this bot work. Don't use personas (they got a limited amount of space you can write).

Instructions!

IF you don't know...

Here's how to get to the main persona settings to describe your character and world build: Go to your profile pic -> go to settings -> scroll down to Appearance (Main Persona); ignore the 1-2
creator: Fenikkusu_AS
